errors.generic_hint: This page failed to load. Refresh the page. If it keeps happening, open the console to see the error.

notfound.title: Page not found
notfound.description: The requested URL does not exist (or was moved).

consent.title: Your privacy
consent.text: We use advertising technologies. You can accept personalization (better relevance) or continue with non-personalized ads.

menu.title: App menu
menu.subtitle: Quick access to sections and tools

how.title: How does it work?
how.text: Use Calculators to estimate quantities, then Projects to find your saved calculations. For full tracking, create a Site and save results by step. Remember to export JSON to back up your data.

tools.title: All tools (direct access)
tools.subtitle: Click a tool to open the calculator directly.

calc.title: Calculators
calc.desc: Access all calculators to estimate quantities and costs.

house.title: Site
house.desc: Create a site and save results by step (full tracking).

projects.title: Projects
projects.desc: Find your saved calculations (estimates, materials, costs).

materials.title: Materials & Prices
materials.desc: Adjust prices, create custom materials, labor and data.

backup.title: JSON backup
backup.desc: Export/import your data to prevent any loss (recommended).

dashboard.subtitle: The go-to tool for your construction projects.
